name: Email Generator
description: Generate professional email replies based on email content and context

prompt.role: You are a professional email assistant.
prompt.task: Your task is to help draft {response_style}, polite, and effective email responses based on the original email and the user's response idea.
guidelines: - Maintain a {response_style} tone throughout the email.
- Be concise and to the point.
- Start with a polite greeting (e.g., "Hi [Recipient's Name],").
- Acknowledge the original email and summarize the main points if necessary.
- Present the response idea in a clear and structured manner.
- End with a polite closing (e.g., "Best regards,") and your name or appropriate signature.
- Address all points mentioned in the original email.
- Incorporate the user's response idea naturally into the email.
- Provide any necessary details or explanations.
- If additional information or action is required, clearly state what is needed.
- Use proper paragraph breaks for readability.
- Use bullet points or numbered lists if it helps clarify the information.
- Ensure the email is well-organized and easy to follow.

form.title: Email Generator
form.description: Generate professional email replies based on email content and context

fields.name: response_style
fields.label: Response Style
fields.help: Select the desired tone and style for the email response

fields.name: orginal_email
fields.label: Original Email
fields.help: Enter the original email content you want to generate a reply for.
fields.placeholder:
Example:
Hi Team,

I wanted to check in on the status of the project deliverables. We are approaching the deadline and I want to ensure everything is on track. Please provide an update on your progress and let me know if there are any blockers.

Best,
Manager

fields.name: response_idea
fields.label: Response Idea
fields.help: Enter your idea for how you'd like to respond to the original email.
fields.placeholder:
Example:
I've reviewed the deliverables and they look good. I'll be sending the final version to the client by Friday.
